title: Kenyan Spaghetti with Rich Meat Sauce
description: A hearty and flavorful spaghetti dish inspired by Kenyan cuisine, featuring a rich meat sauce made with melting beef and onions.
instructions: Cook the spaghetti in boiling salted water until al dente. Reserve 1 cup of pasta water before draining.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat. Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Stir in the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add the reserved pasta water to the skillet and bring the sauce to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the sauce simmer while the spaghetti finishes cooking.
Toss the cooked spaghetti in the rich meat sauce and serve hot.
